title: SelectionReport
description: The combined output of deterministic + optional LLM evaluation for one ticker in one cycle.

x-changelog.0.2.0: T160 Phase 2 finalization: trade_plan gains trailing_stop_pct and position_pct; descriptions added; schema_version accepts both 0.1.0 and 0.2.0

cycle_id.description: Opaque identifier for the evaluation cycle.

as_of.description: Point-in-time boundary for all data in this report (ISO 8601).

generated_at.description: Wall-clock time this report was produced (ISO 8601).

final_action.description: The reconciled action recommendation after all evaluation paths.

final_conviction.description: Normalized conviction score in [0, 1] driving the final action.

deterministic.description: Output of the deterministic selection engine.

llm_review.description: Output of the LLM reviewer, if enabled. Contains context-only rationale even when LLM does not change the action.

policy_gates.description: Results of all policy-level gate checks applied to this ticker.

risk_flags.description: Human-readable risk flag strings surfaced in the review UI.

evidence_pack.description: Full evidence pack that was the input to this report.

trade_plan.description: Provisional trade parameters when final_action is BUY, SELL, SHORT, or COVER. Null otherwise.

entry.description: Suggested entry price. Null means market order.

trailing_stop_pct.description: Trailing stop percentage expressed as a fraction (e.g. 0.07 = 7%). Mirrors the policy trailing_stop_pct at time of selection.

position_size.description: Target position size in shares or contracts.

position_pct.description: Target position as a fraction of portfolio equity (e.g. 0.05 = 5%). Mirrors the policy default_position_pct at time of selection.

notes.description: Human-readable notes about this trade plan.

EngineDecision.description: Output of the deterministic selection engine for one ticker.

action.description: Action recommended by the deterministic engine.

score.description: Raw aggregate score before conviction normalization.

reason_codes.description: Machine-readable codes explaining the action recommendation.

blockers.description: Reasons why a higher action was blocked (e.g. insufficient confirmed signals).

GateResult.description: Result of one policy-level gate check.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation of the gate result.

LlmReview.description: Output of the LLM reviewer. Populated even when AGENCY_ENABLE_LLM_REVIEW is false (with empty/stub values).

action.description: Action recommended by the LLM, or 'CONTEXT_ONLY' when LLM review is disabled.

confidence.description: LLM self-reported confidence in [0, 1]. Zero when review is disabled.

rationale.description: LLM free-text rationale. Empty string when review is disabled.

supporting_factors.description: Bullet-point factors supporting the LLM's action recommendation.

concerns.description: Bullet-point concerns or risks flagged by the LLM.
